scripts.install:all: cd payment-platform-core && npm ci && cd ../payment-platform-portal && npm ci && cd ../payment-platform-sdk && npm ci && cd ../services/audit-service && npm ci && cd ../invoice-service && npm ci && cd ../notification-service && npm ci && cd ../reporting-service && npm ci && cd ../settlement-service && npm ci
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "cd payment-platform-core && npm run dev" "cd payment-platform-portal && npm run dev"
scripts.build:all: cd payment-platform-core && npm run build && cd ../payment-platform-portal && npm run build && cd ../payment-platform-sdk && npm run build
